reason: Successfully tested agent communication with a simple math question and verified the agent responded with the correct answer.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - App loaded successfully with sidebar showing two agents including "QA-20260526-200048-682x"
Step 2: Found and clicked the "QA-20260526-200048-682x" agent in the sidebar - Agent detail page opened showing the agent name in the header
Step 3: Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status displayed as "idle" in the top right corner of the page
Step 4: Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message successfully typed and submitted via the Send button. A new session "Basic Math Question with QA Agent" was created in the sidebar
Step 5: Waited up to 3 minutes for a response - Agent responded successfully in 2 seconds. Status changed from "working" back to "idle"
Step 6: Verified the response mentions "4" - Agent's response displayed "4" on the screen, with timing info "Worked for 2s" shown below the response
